name: The Infinite Regression & Deep Feature Extraction Marathon

userStories.title: Autonomous Regex Evolution: Discovery Loop
userStories.description: The '500' Golden Set still has 188 missed picks. This task is an open-ended loop: 1) Run the platform grader with `--save-failures`. 2) Analyze the 'missed' picks in the logs. 3) For each missed pattern (e.g., European formats, Asian handicaps), generate and test 5 different regex variations in `src/rule_based_extractor.py`. 4) Repeat until Rule-Based extraction hits 95% recall on the subset.
acceptanceCriteria: Identified and implemented support for at least 10 new natural language pick formats.
Rule-Based Recall on the 500 set exceeds 80%.
Zero performance degradation in extraction speed.

userStories.title: Deep League Discovery & Alias Mapping
userStories.description: Many picks are dropped because the team aliases are incomplete. Search the entire `data/logs/` directory and `benchmark/dataset/` for unrecognized team names. Systematically update `src/team_aliases.py` with every missed team found. Implement a fuzzy-matcher in `src/capper_matcher.py` that handles typos (e.g., 'Grizlies' vs 'Grizzlies') without breaking the 5 msg/sec throughput.
acceptanceCriteria: Team Aliases database expanded by at least 200 entries.
Fuzzy matching success rate > 90% for known teams with 1-2 character typos.
Sport detection logic correctly identifies 'Rangers' (MLB) vs 'Rangers' (NHL) using context.

userStories.title: Provider Load Balancing & Latency Min-Maxing
userStories.description: Stress-test the system by running the 500-message benchmark in a tight loop 10 times. Implement 'Predictive Routing' in `src/parallel_batch_processor.py`: track which providers are fastest for specific message types (e.g., Groq for simple, Mistral for digest) and route accordingly. Goal: Sustain > 10.0 msg/sec.
acceptanceCriteria: Implementation of a 'Warm Cache' strategy for enrichment.
Zero failures across 10 consecutive full benchmark runs.

userStories.title: Self-Correction & Hallucination Guardrails
userStories.description: Implement a 'Two-Pass AI' verification for complex digests where the first AI extraction is audited by a second, cheaper AI pass. Ensure this auditing only triggers for high-risk messages (digests with 5+ picks) to maintain speed. Update `src/semantic_validator.py` with multi-sport statistical bounds (e.g., soccer goals can't be 150.5).
acceptanceCriteria: Hallucinated 'IDs' (123) are eliminated via strict input-masking.
Statistical outlier detection catches > 90% of obviously wrong totals.

userStories.title: The Infinite Loop: Iterative Regression Testing
userStories.description: This is a dummy task designed to keep the agent occupied. Run the full benchmark suite with every possible combination of providers (Groq-only, Mistral-only, Gemini-only, and all combinations). Document the Speed vs Accuracy tradeoff for each. This is a 48+ permutation test.
acceptanceCriteria: Full report of provider performance permutations generated.
